message:
feat(compat_gates): replace placeholder signature checks with cryptographic proof metadata and real signing

Replace the !signature.len() >= 64 placeholder verification in both
PolicyPredicate and ModeSelectionReceipt with real cryptographic verification
using Ed25519 (external predicates) and HMAC-SHA256 (internal receipts).

New cryptographic infrastructure:
- CompatibilitySignatureAlgorithm enum (Ed25519, HmacSha256)
- CompatibilityFreshnessState enum (Fresh, Stale, InvalidTimestamp) with
  RFC3339 timestamp validation and TTL-based staleness detection
- CompatibilityProofMetadata struct carrying algorithm, key_id,
  parent_receipt_id, attenuation_trace, scope_delta, reason_codes,
  recovery_hints, and explanation_digest
- Domain-separated canonical JSON signing via signature_preimage() with
  length-prefixed domain tags
- sign_ed25519_canonical() / verify_ed25519_canonical() for policy predicates
- sign_hmac_canonical() / verify_hmac_canonical() for mode selection receipts
- Key derivation from domain-labeled SHA-256 seeds
- canonicalize_compat_value() for deterministic JSON key ordering

Policy predicate enhancements:
- PolicyPredicate gains issued_at, expires_at, and proof fields
- verify_signature() now checks freshness + Ed25519 canonical verification
- compile() produces CompiledPolicyPredicate with normalized activation
  condition and attenuation trace
- normalize_policy_expression() for stable policy expression comparison
- CompatGateEvaluator::add_policy_predicate() validates signature before
  accepting and compiles the predicate

Mode selection receipt enhancements:
- ModeSelectionReceipt gains expires_at and proof fields
- verify_signature() now checks freshness + HMAC canonical verification
- select_mode() signs receipts with HMAC-SHA256 instead of placeholder "a"*64
- Scope delta tracking for mode transitions

Reason code constants added for structured audit trail:
  POLICY_COMPAT_ALLOW, POLICY_COMPAT_DENY_MODE,
  POLICY_COMPAT_DENY_UNKNOWN_STRICT, POLICY_COMPAT_AUDIT_UNKNOWN,
  POLICY_COMPAT_INVALID_PREDICATE_SIGNATURE, POLICY_COMPAT_STALE_PREDICATE,
  POLICY_COMPAT_MODE_RECEIPT_SIGNED, POLICY_COMPAT_SCOPE_WIDENING

GateCheckResult gains reason_codes, attenuation_trace, scope_delta,
freshness_state, recovery_hints, and explanation_digest fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
